title: Middle Eastern Sirloin Kebabs
description: A flavorful and spicy recipe for sirloin kebabs, inspired by the bold flavors of the Middle East. Marinated in a mixture of citrusy and aromatic spices, these kebabs are perfect for a quick and delicious dinner.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a blender or food processor, combine lemon juice, garlic, cumin, coriander, paprika, salt, and black pepper. Blend until smooth.

Place the sirloin steak in a large ziplock bag or a shallow dish. Pour the marinade over the steak, turning to coat evenly. Seal the bag or cover the dish with plastic wrap. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Thread the marinated sirloin onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the kebabs with olive oil and season with salt and black pepper.
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Transfer the kebabs to a plate and garnish with chopped fresh parsley.
Let the kebabs rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
